name: educator
description: AI-powered math tutor — Claude generates step-by-step, curriculum-aware solutions.

scripts.build: npm --workspace apps/web run build && npm --workspace functions run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace apps/web run lint && npm --workspace functions run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace apps/web run typecheck && npm --workspace functions run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --workspace apps/web test -- --run && npm --workspace functions test -- --run
